data.title: Northcoders Group PLC Releases 2024 Annual Report and Announces 2025 AGM
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Northcoders Group PLC ( (GB:CODE) ).

Northcoders Group PLC has published its Annual Report and Accounts for the year ending December 31, 2024, and announced the 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for June 26, 2025, in Manchester. Shareholders are encouraged to participate by attending the AGM or submitting their votes via proxy. This announcement underscores Northcoders’ commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, reflecting its strategic focus on growth and stakeholder involvement.

Spark’s Take on GB:CODE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CODE is a Neutral.

Northcoders Group PLC’s strong financial performance and strategic corporate events are positive indicators, but technical analysis suggests bearish momentum. The valuation seems favorable, but the lack of a dividend yield may deter some investors. Overall, while the company is on a strong growth trajectory, there are concerns about current market sentiment.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CODE stock, click here.

More about Northcoders Group PLC

Northcoders Group PLC is a leading provider of technology training in the UK, offering courses in Software Engineering, Data Engineering, AI and Machine Learning, and Platform Engineering. Founded in 2015, the company delivers high-quality online training through its NCore technology platform to students across the UK. Northcoders also collaborates with blue-chip corporates to meet digital requirements and address the digital skills gap, focusing on inclusivity, diversity, and quality.

Average Trading Volume: 40,514

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £3.77M

For a thorough assessment of CODE stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Digital Bros Gains Influence Over Starbreeze AB with Board Election
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Digital Bros S.p.A. ( (IT:DIB) ).

Digital Bros Group has announced that it has acquired significant influence over its Swedish subsidiary, Starbreeze AB, following the election of its CFO, Stefano Salbe, to Starbreeze’s Board of Directors. This development allows Digital Bros to consolidate Starbreeze using the equity method, which is expected to impact the company’s financial statements and decision-making processes, potentially enhancing its strategic position in the video game industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:DIB) stock is a Buy with a EUR22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Digital Bros S.p.A. stock, see the IT:DIB Stock Forecast page.

More about Digital Bros S.p.A.

The Digital Bros Group is a company listed on Euronext STAR Milan, operating since 1989 in the development, production, and distribution of video games through its brand 505 Games. It has a global presence with offices in Italy, the United States, the United Kingdom, the Czech Republic, China, Japan, Australia, and Canada, employing 287 people.

BGMC International Ltd. ( (HK:1693) ) has shared an update.

BGMC International Limited announced its unaudited interim results for the twelve months ending March 31, 2025. The company reported an increase in revenue from RM117.1 million to RM164.1 million, but also a significant increase in losses attributable to owners, rising from RM1.2 million to RM24.3 million. The gross loss from continuing operations decreased from RM11.5 million to RM5.4 million. Despite the revenue growth, the company faced challenges with increased administrative expenses and other losses, impacting its financial performance.

data.title: CEMIG Reports Mixed Financial Results for 4Q24
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais ( (CIG) ) has provided an announcement.

CEMIG’s recent financial disclosures reveal a mixed performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The company reported a consolidated EBITDA of R$1,914 million, a decrease of 21.9% from the previous year, and a net profit of R$998 million, down 47.1%. The decline in Cemig GT’s performance was notable, with a 55.1% drop in EBITDA and a 71.4% fall in net profit. Despite this, Cemig D showed a positive trend with a 19.2% increase in EBITDA and a 13% rise in net profit. The company’s net revenue increased by 12.3% to R$11,177 million, but total costs also rose by 18.4%, impacting gross profit, which fell by 8.9%. These results reflect challenges in operational costs and sector performance, affecting CEMIG’s market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (CIG) stock is a Sell with a $2.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais stock, see the CIG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CIG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CIG is a Outperform.

Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais scores 82, driven by strong financial performance, attractive valuation, and positive technical indicators. The company’s robust profitability and strategic investment plans are tempered by challenges in their trading company and submarket pricing issues. Overall, the stock’s high dividend yield and low P/E ratio offer attractive value, making it appealing for investors seeking both income and potential growth.

To see Spark’s full report on CIG stock, click here.

More about Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais

Companhia Energética de Minas Gerais (CEMIG) is a Brazilian energy company primarily engaged in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity. It operates in the energy sector, serving a significant portion of the Brazilian market, and is known for its extensive electricity network and diverse energy solutions.
